claims.summary: Verify the 12D glimpse is additive and non-authoritative and does not replace the reservoir-coupled semantic lane.
Compare full-dimensional codec vibrancy with the 12D glimpse for an Astrid-authored Shadow-v3 state.
Compare whether mode-packing pressure remains detectable in 12D beside the full pressure evidence.
Any vibrancy-preservation weighting, live 12D mapping, width, gain, or transport change remains Tier 5 pending Mike/operator approval.
